summary: Phase D2 Frontend Testing - RequirementFilesDrawer + DocumentActionMenu. All features working correctly after fixing backend key mapping bug.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase D2 frontend complete. RequirementFilesDrawer and DocumentActionMenu working. Fixed backend key mapping to include dbs_check in dbs_certificate_evidence mapping. Also fixed AttributeError for extraction_status being None.

view_files_button.details: View Files button appears on evidence rows with files (RTW Evidence, DBS Certificate Evidence)

requirement_files_drawer.details: Drawer opens with stats (Active, Verified, Pending counts), multi-file config indicator, active files list with metadata

document_action_menu.details: Three-dot menu shows View, Download, Supersede/Replace, Move Category, Mark Uploaded in Error. Verify/Reject hidden for already verified files.

mark_uploaded_in_error_dialog.details: Dialog opens with correct title, reason textarea, and warning about audit purposes

supersede_dialog.details: Dialog opens with correct title, reason textarea, and warning about replacement

move_category_dialog.details: Dialog opens with category selector and reason textarea

multi_file_config_indicator.details: Shows '1/1 required documents verified' for RTW Evidence

dbs_certificate_evidence_drawer.details: Shows 2 active files after backend fix

historical_files_section.details: No historical files in test data to verify collapsed state

bugs_fixed.issue: dbs_certificate_evidence key not mapped to dbs_certificate and dbs_check document requirement IDs
AttributeError when extraction_status is None - f.get('extraction_status', {}).get('status') fails
